normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem SU5_empty_input : interval_scheduling ([] : List (Int Ã— Int)) = 0
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Empty input: the result is 0 when the input is empty.
Endpoint convention: intervals sharing only an endpoint are non-overlapping (using [start,end) so a.2 = b.1 is allowed).
